doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_add1sp3 (mpfr/src/add1sp.c L613-L770): same-precision same-sign addition fast path for 2*GMP_NUMB_BITS < p < 3*GMP_NUMB_BITS (= 129 <= p <= 191 on x86_64). Three-limb mantissas with sh = 192 - p in [1, 63]. Same bigint extended-precision strategy as add1sp2/2n: order operands, compute S = (large.mant << d) + small.mant exactly, round via roundMantissa, delegate overflow.
c_signature: static int mpfr_add1sp3(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, mpfr_srcptr c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode, mpfr_prec_t p)
divergence_from_c: Same as add1sp2 / 2n: 3-limb decomposition collapsed to single bigint; static linkage dropped; Result return shape.
refs: mpfr/src/add1sp.c L613-L770 — verbatim C reference body.
src/ops/sub1sp3.ts — companion op (sub direction) at same prec range.
